_note: JSON sidecar for migration-manifest.yaml. The wizard runtime CLI consumes JSON; YAML is the human-facing companion. Both files MUST stay in sync.

inventory_check_result.classification_confirmed: first_concrete_per_version_prerelease_package stands; no operator-project migration debt accruing silently; confirmed: no formal v1 bundle has shipped; no persisted v0.x operator-project bundles exist. Pre-v1-stabilization clause active.
inventory_check_result.scope: Carry-forward from the 2026-05-20 inventory check at wizard/foundation-bundles/v0/migration_manifest.yaml. No new operator projects created between 2026-05-20 and 2026-05-21; carry-forward is sound.

migrations.notes: First concrete per-version foundation-bundle package (2026-05-21 release). Convention amendment landed at the canonical foundation-versioning specification (per-version directory layout decoupled from v1.0.0 stability commitment). Package self-contained: own schemas, own templates, own baselines, own manifest, own migration-manifest. Generator-version identity NOT wired at v0.3.0 — forthcoming. v0.3.0 manifest OMITS generator_version with header comment noting deferral.
migrations.stop_condition: No operator project depends on v0.2 (inventory check carry-forward from the 2026-05-20 release: zero v0.1 or persisted v0.2 operator-project bundles found). Per pre-v1 stabilization clause applies; no operator-project migration runbook required. If a v0.2-installed operator project surfaces in future inventory check, file an investigation and reinstall foundation bundle from v0.3.0 OR later release.
